title: Hamamatsu, Shizuoka — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Hamamatsu, Shizuoka: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Hamamatsu is a city in Shizuoka with a population of 800,000. A manufacturing powerhouse known for motorcycles and musical instruments, with beautiful Lake Hamana and unagi eel.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
